title: Caiophora coronata
taxonomy: Caiophora coronata is classified within the family Polemoniaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the globe-flowers or pringle poppies. The genus Caiophora is a part of this family and is native to South America. Caiophora coronata is a species within this genus, and its classification is further defined by its unique characteristics and physical attributes. The classification of Caiophora coronata provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species within the Polemoniaceae family.
